modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log into the LiveWell benefits site.

full_description_text:
- I was trying to access the LiveWell benefits site at https://livewellsd.sd.gov/en/login/ to check my benefits.
- However, I found myself unable to sign in, which was quite frustrating.
- I made sure to enter my username and password correctly, but it just wouldn’t let me in.
- It’s important for me to access this site, so I hope someone can help me figure this out soon!
